reviews.author: Srinivasan
reviews.review_body:
This is a real school that truly supports students in their career growth. From an early stage, students are becoming smarter and more well-prepared. The five-pillar activities and training provided to shape students are truly appreciable.

Please continue the wonderful work. As a suggestion, giving a bit more priority to academics would further strengthen students’ future prospects, as academics also play an important role in higher careers.

reviews.author: sree soorya
reviews.review_body:
Well had a good experience in SNS ACADEMY from the date of joining and there is a good response from reception at every time, then they are providing good transport facilities!!!
Thank you 😊

reviews.author: Anitha K
reviews.review_body:
My kid is studying in Grade III. I am happy to join my kid in SNS family. He joined for Grade 2 and initially I was scared how he could perform because he studied in a school were there few kids. Thanks to SNS family and now my son has grew up as a confident speaker. The school has provided him the many opportunities through competitions and good motivation from management , staffs and even co workers. I am very happy and glad that I choose correct platform. He participated in ALL ROUNDER PERFOEMER (  ARP) award competition for the first time in his grade 2, n he got award from technical director Nalin sir.I am very happy  and which motivated him to join again in Grade 3 , he got through two rounds.The second round  as poster presentation gave a better platform to improve presentation skills,  my kid spoke very confidently. GOOD IN EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITES LIKE SWIMMING, SPORTS.

THANKS TO SNS FAMILY FOR INTRODUCING THE KIDS TO ENTREPRENEURSHIP
WORLD AND DESIGN THINKING AT THE EARLIER STAGE.
MY SON RITHVIK KRISHNA CURRENTLY IN GRADE III B  WANTS TO CONTINUE HIS STUDIES ONLY IN SNS FAMILY.

reviews.author: Sow Karthika
reviews.review_body: I am delighted to have enrolled my child in SNS Academy. The teachers are kind, and their calm and thoughtful approach to engaging with the children is truly commendable. The school’s infrastructure and the events they organize, such as Family Day, Grandparents’ Day, ramp walks, and various celebrations, bring immense joy while fostering learning and growth. Witnessing my 3.5-year-old confidently walk on stage without fear was a remarkable moment. My heartfelt thanks to the school and its management for creating such a nurturing and empowering environment.

reviews.author: Senthil Kumar Sellappan
reviews.review_body:
Real school which is giving opportunity to students in their career growth. Students are getting more smarter and stuffed in early as stage.
Their 5 pillars related activities and training to shape up the students is really appericiable one.
Keep up your good thing you are doing.
One suggestion is that students acedamic perspective also we need more focus as we feel there's not much priority given for this area and it also plays vital role in students higher careers.

reviews.author: Manoj Krishna
reviews.review_body: Best infrastructure,  organised today's event Gen AI very well

reviews.author: Sivaraman Valliappan
reviews.review_body:
This is to bring to your attention a serious issue regarding the driver of school bus (Vehicle No: 8901), Mr. Siva Kumar. On [13/12/2024 ], the following violations were observed:

Rash Driving: The driver exhibited reckless behavior, posing a danger to the students and others on the road.
Failure to Obey Traffic Rules: Important traffic regulations were ignored, compromising safety.
Use of Inappropriate Language: The driver used disrespectful and unacceptable language, setting a poor example for the children.
Such behavior is not only unprofessional but also endangers the lives of the students and undermines the trust parents place in the school's transportation system.

Immediate action is requested to address this matter and ensure the safety and well-being of all students.

reviews.author: Senthil Kumar
reviews.review_body: The school is very excellent good infrastructure ,good place to learn and also satisfeid with the school transport  services..

reviews.review_body: Fingerprints have their uniqueness cause it has their specialty likewise the Academy functions. Every individual talent is identified with various clubs and activities. This paves the way for the kids for embarking their talents into skills.

reviews.review_body: Unique talent can be identified within the campus. All the facilities is impressive. Best school in Coimbatore.
